# Pull Request

## Summary

Describe the technical change.

## Type of change

- [ ] Code
- [ ] SQL / data quality
- [ ] Dashboard / visual polish
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] Tests / CI
- [ ] Public-safety improvement

## Quality checklist

- [ ] README or docs updated when relevant
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] `pytest` passes
- [ ] No generated CSV/model/output artifacts committed
- [ ] No real banking, insurance, health, client or employer data
- [ ] No CV, cover letter, job tracker or application material
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, private IPs or hostnames
- [ ] Screenshots, if any, are sanitized

## Evidence

Add commands run, screenshots, or relevant outputs.
